Configured the UAT pipeline stage and backend settings.

Updates completed:
- Added UAT environment configuration.
- Added UAT backend variable group usage.
- Fixed backend key handling so the pipeline uses the Library BackendKey instead of falling back to the hardcoded main.tf backend key.
- Confirmed UAT backend/state routing through Terraform init.

Validated up to Terraform plan using the UAT backend/state. Ready to close this subtask.


Configured the Prod pipeline stage placeholders/settings.

Updates completed:
- Added Prod stage configuration placeholder using the same pipeline/template pattern as the other environments.
- Confirmed the Prod block is structurally aligned with the UAT/Test/Dev stage configuration.
- Prod execution is not part of the current UAT deployment run and will remain controlled separately.

Ready to close this subtask.



Validated UAT deployment pipeline readiness.

Updates completed:
- Tested updated pipeline path across Dev/Test up to Terraform plan.
- Repointed final configuration back to UAT.
- Confirmed UAT build and Terraform plan pass using the correct UAT backend/state.
- Added Library-based Dataverse/blob/proxy variable wiring.
- Added proxy validation so the pipeline fails early if required proxy values are missing or unresolved.

Actual UAT deployment execution will continue under the separate execution subtask.


Starting UAT deployment execution.

The base environment pipeline readiness validation is complete and the PR has been updated for review. Once approved and merged, I will execute the UAT deployment from the standard DEDIAAutomationDevelop path and validate the deployment result.
